form.formComment: Resuming after a break of five months. Finished off last campaign when last of 7 at Arapahoe Park November 14 over 91m, 5 len behind Dynastys Gold Eagle carrying 56kg at $6.40. When resuming last campaign second last in a small field at Arapahoe Park September 21 over 91m, 1.75 len behind Diabolical Clyde with 56.5kg at $4.50. Win would surprise.
